Sponsorships / Streamlabs

Streamlabs

software
Sponsorship and Affiliate
$10-$20 per Subscription
affiliate; sponsorship
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

Streamlabs provides an all-in-one live streaming software for content creators. You’ve heard of them.

Affiliate Program

Earn money by referring your community to Streamlabs.

  • Earn $20.00 every time your viewers use your promo code to purchase an annual package
  • Earn $10.00 every time your viewers use your promo code to purchase the monthly package Signup for the affiliate program here: https://streamlabs.com/affiliates

Streamlabs All Stars

Earn points and redeem rewards as you use Streamlabs and grow.

  • Redeem rewards. All Stars can redeem apparel, accessories, discounts, custom graphics, giveaway entries, exclusive event swag, hardware drops, and more.
  • Earn points with ease. Stream with Streamlabs Desktop, complete tasks, and grow your viewership to level up and unlock more rewards.
  • Win cool prizes. Awesome giveaways including hardware, PCs, consoles, event tickets, and more! Explore and join our giveaways from your All Stars dashboard.
  • More rewards with Ultra. Streamlabs members always save on Logitech G gear. When you upgrade to Streamlabs Ultra, you automatically upgrade to Gold All Stars status. You also unlock exclusive Logitech G discounts each month. Sign up for the All Star program here: https://streamlabs.com/allstars

FOS Affiliate Program

This sponsorship is part of our affiliate network.
